pattern: KVSharer direct twin + multi-cluster KV partition adjacency

honest_audit.borderline_notes: SUTARTINE-KV's K-staggered sub-cache with dissonance penalty is functionally KVSharer (dissimilarity-driven) extended to K partitions; LMCache + Recursion-Wise KV + Inter-Layer Similarity Compression saturate the multi-partition + similarity primitive.
